request.query: The input rows are candidates a semantic search returned for the query: "Revenue or sales leaders at companies that raised a Series B in the last 6 months and are rapidly scaling their go-to-market team". For each input row, research and verify whether the person actually satisfies the full query — pay special attention to any negative or absence condition (e.g. "does NOT have X", "hasn't done Y"), since semantic search cannot reliably exclude on those. Return one verdict per input row, preserving its personId, with matches true/false and a one-sentence reason citing what you found.

verified.reason: Tyler John matches: LinkedIn identifies him as Actively AI's CRO, and Actively announced a $45M Series B on Apr. 28, 2026 with funding earmarked for hiring talent and enterprise/GTM expansion.
Steve Bailey is CodeSignal's CRO and leads its GTM organization, but CodeSignal's Series B closed on Dec. 8, 2020, not within the last six months.
Zack Sikora is Endor Labs' CRO and the company is expanding global go-to-market, but Endor Labs' $93M Series B was announced Apr. 23, 2025, outside the six-month window.
Kendra Searle is VP of Revenue at Paid and is hiring across GTM roles, but Paid's recent Apr. 28, 2026 financing was a $21M Seed round, not a Series B.
Emil Dyrvig leads sales/business development at Laurel and is scaling sales/GTM, but Laurel had already raised a Series C by 2025 and there is no evidence of a Series B in the last six months.
